name: Sundaram Brake Linings Limited
summary: Sundaram Brake Linings Limited manufactures and sells asbestos free friction materials in India. The company's products include brake linings, brake pads, clutch facings, and PV linings and pads. Its products are used in commercial vehicles, passenger cars, agricultural tractors, railways, and two wheelers. The company also exports its products to approximately 54 countries worldwide. Sundaram Brake Linings Limited was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Chennai, India.
